title: Polished Leveling role and reward management
items: Stopped the mobile reward-role picker from automatically opening the keyboard and closing its dropdown; touch devices now open directly into a stable scrollable role list.
Replaced the browser confirmation alert for removing reward mappings with a centered Meowz-styled confirmation dialog that explains exactly what will and will not be deleted.
Added safe Discord role deletion from the Leveling panel with exact-name confirmation, linked reward cleanup, compact reward rows and clearer create, select and delete controls.

title: Reliable bot-side role creation
items: Completed the bot API support used by the Leveling dashboard to create editable Discord reward roles.
Removed the website-side direct Discord fallback so role creation stays behind the authenticated Meowz bot API connection.
Added a clear deployment-version error when the website is connected to an outdated bot service.
